Added_Other.purpose: Improves video streaming quality for players by adapting to their internet speed.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTypeBandwidthMetrics_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Collects and analyzes bandwidth usage data for better performance monitoring.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps improve game performance by optimizing network usage based on player data.

Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and updates in the codebase more efficiently.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how timestamps are formatted in dynamic strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Provides players with clearer and more readable time information.

Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the speed of retrieving version information for smoother updates.

Added_Other.name: DFFlagBatchedInstancePush_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Groups multiple changes to game objects and sends them to the server in one go.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing lag during updates.

Added_Other.purpose: Simplifies the video handling process, potentially improving performance and stability for players.

Added_Other.purpose: Allows developers to easily manage and debug voice chat functionalities.
